description_long: This rifle features a compact, modern design with a predominantly matte black body and a distinct wooden grip. The upper receiver is cylindrical and robust, with a tubular structure running parallel above it, likely serving as a protective or mounting rail. The grip and trigger assembly are angular and ergonomic, crafted from a material resembling polished wood, providing a visual contrast to the rest of the firearm. The barrel is short and integrated into the main body, with minimal protrusion beyond the front end. The rear of the rifle is capped with a rounded, reinforced section, and the overall silhouette is streamlined for ease of handling. The rifle lacks visible advanced optics or attachments, emphasizing a utilitarian, urban-ready appearance.
description: A compact, matte black rifle with a wooden grip and a streamlined, modern silhouette. Features a short barrel, tubular upper rail, and minimal external attachments.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, highlighting the wooden grip, black cylindrical receiver, and tubular upper rail.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the short barrel opening, tubular rail above, and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the wooden grip and black body clearly visible.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the end cap, the width of the wooden grip, and the alignment of the upper rail.
